sectors.news_driver: India plotting a game-changer for RBI, banks, corporates, investors

stocks.name: State Bank of India
stocks.reason: Government's plan to reform RBI and banking sector -> potential changes in regulatory framework -> no immediate impact on SBI's operations

stocks.reason: Private bank's deposit collection from rural areas -> increased focus on rural lending -> potential 5% increase in rural loan book

stocks.name: Indian Oil Corporation
stocks.reason: Rising oil prices -> increased cost of crude oil imports -> 100bps decrease in IOC's refining margins

sectors.news_driver: Cement sector faces muted Q1 FY27

sectors.watch: Cement demand trends in Q2 FY27

stocks.name: Tata Consultancy Services
